 read_param_file (param_fname)

str VERSION = 'v5.0'
 
bool CATALOGS = True
 
bool PLC = True
 
bool HISTORIES = True
 
dict params
 
 param_fname = sys.argv[1]
 
dict runflag = params['RunFlag'][0]
 
dict output_fname = params['OutputList'][0]
 
 outputs = np.loadtxt(output_fname,unpack=True)
 
int Nerrors = 0
 
str pin_fname = f'pinocchio.{z:6.4f}.{runflag}.catalog.out'
 
 cat1 = rp.catalog(pin_fname,silent=True)
 
str fits_fname = pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
 
 f = fits.open(fits_fname)
 
list names = []
 
str n = f'TTYPE{i}'
 

Function Documentation

◆ read_param_file()

ValidateFits.read_param_file (   param_fname)

Definition at line 62 of file ValidateFits.py.

62def read_param_file(param_fname):
63
64
65 try:
66 f=open(param_fname)
67 except:
68 print(f'Error: parameter file {param_fname} not found')
69 return 1
70
71 #print(f'Parameters in file: {param_fname}')
72
73 for line in f:
74
75 if line[0]=='#' or line[0]=='%':
76 continue
77
78 keys=line.split()
79
80 if len(keys)==0 or keys[0]=='%':
81 continue
82
83 if keys[0] not in params:
84 print(f"WARNING: unrecognized parameter, {keys[0]}")
85
86 else:
87
88 if params[keys[0]][0]=='False':
89 params[keys[0]][0]='True'
90 elif keys[0]=='PLCCenter' or keys[0]=='PLCAxis':
91 params[keys[0]][0]=keys[1]+' '+keys[2]+' '+keys[3]
92 else:
93 params[keys[0]][0]=keys[1]
94
95 f.close()
96
97 return 0
98
